allow: PowerShell($f = Get-Item .auth/user.json; "user.json last written: " + $f.LastWriteTime + " \(" + [math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $f.LastWriteTime\).TotalMinutes,1\) + " min ago\)")

Bash(PW_TRACE=1 PW_TRACE_DIR=reports/traces/empty-state npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/features/support/*.ts --require tests/step_definitions/*.ts tests/features/*.feature --tags "@stub-empty-certifications")

Bash(PW_TRACE=1 PW_TRACE_DIR=reports/traces npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require "tests/features/support/*.ts" --require "tests/step_definitions/*.ts" tests/features/*.feature --tags "@stub-error-certifications")

PowerShell($word = $null; try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; Write-Output "WORD_AVAILABLE" } catch { Write-Output "NO_WORD" }; if \($word\) { $word.Quit\(\) }; python -c "import docx; print\('PYTHON_DOCX_AVAILABLE'\)" 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Output "NO_PYTHON_DOCX" })
